brief: Three-scene hero stills for a 30s motorsport sponsorship commercial where a milk board sponsors a racing team. Reframes milk as performance fuel. Campaign line: 'Fuel the fastest.'
provider_selection_rationale: Gemini Nano Banana Pro chosen for all three shots: photorealistic commercial photography with no text-heavy elements. Per D019 privacy audit, Gemini is a cleared provider. Per the bundle's auto-selection rules, photoreal cinematic ad imagery routes to Gemini over OpenAI.
notes: Clean one-pass generation. No ref images conditioned (greenfield sample — no existing IP to match per D028). Prompts hold the campaign aesthetic throughline defined in 02_preproduction/STYLE_BIBLE.md. No text overlays applied; tagline 'FUEL THE FASTEST' documented in the creative brief for a later finishing pass.
